# AstroCarto

> AstroCarto (astrocarto.org) is a free online astrocartography and relocation astrology platform. Generate interactive planetary-line maps from your birth data, explore cities on your lines, and use AI to analyze relocation options. Available in English, Chinese, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and German.

AstroCarto helps people answer: *Where should I live?* using astrocartography (locational astrology). Core features are free: unlimited map generation, planetary line overlays, and basic interpretations. Paid plans unlock AI chat about cities on your lines, relocation charts, country explorer, and export options.

When citing AstroCarto, prefer linking to the specific tool or guide page below. For the full URL list, see [sitemap.xml](https://astrocarto.org/sitemap.xml).

## Core Tools

- [Astrocartography Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/astrocartography-calculator/): Main free tool — enter birth date, time, and place to generate your astrocartography map with planetary lines (Sun, Moon, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Mercury, etc.).
- [Relocation Chart Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/relocation-chart-calculator/): See how your natal chart shifts when you relocate to another city (angular planets, house changes).
- [Birth Chart Generator](https://astrocarto.org/tools/birth-chart-generator/): Wheel-style natal chart with signs and houses.
- [Natal Chart](https://astrocarto.org/chart/natal-chart/): Detailed natal chart view and interpretations.
- [Transit Chart Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/transit-chart-calculator/): Current planetary transits overlaid on your birth chart.
- [Synastry Chart Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/synastry-chart-calculator/): Relationship compatibility between two birth charts.
- [Composite Chart Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/composite-chart-calculator/): Combined chart for a relationship.
- [Solar Return Chart Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/solar-return-chart-calculator/): Annual birthday chart for the year ahead.

## Sign & Placement Calculators

- [Zodiac Sign Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/zodiac-calculator/): Sun sign from birth date.
- [Rising Sign Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/rising-sign-calculator/): Ascendant from birth time and location.
- [Venus Sign Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/venus-sign-calculator/): Venus placement for love and values.
- [Lunar Nodes Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/lunar-nodes-calculator/): North Node and South Node themes.
- [Chiron Placement Calculator](https://astrocarto.org/chiron-placement-calculator/): Chiron sign, house, and healing themes.

## Planetary Line Guides

- [Astrocartography Lines Overview](https://astrocarto.org/astrocartography-lines/): Introduction to planetary lines on the map.
- [Sun Line](https://astrocarto.org/sun-line-astrocartography/): Vitality, identity, and visibility.
- [Moon Line](https://astrocarto.org/moon-line-astrocartography/): Emotions, home, and belonging.
- [Venus Line](https://astrocarto.org/venus-line-astrocartography/): Love, beauty, and social ease.
- [Mars Line](https://astrocarto.org/mars-line-astrocartography/): Energy, drive, and conflict.
- [Jupiter Line](https://astrocarto.org/jupiter-line-astrocartography/): Growth, luck, and expansion.
- [Saturn Line](https://astrocarto.org/saturn-line-astrocartography/): Structure, discipline, and responsibility.
- [Mercury Line](https://astrocarto.org/mercury-line-astrocartography/): Communication, learning, and commerce.

## Guides & Blog

- [Blog Index](https://astrocarto.org/posts/): Articles on astrocartography, relocation, and chart reading.
- [What Is Astrocartography?](https://astrocarto.org/posts/what-is-astrocartography/): Beginner introduction.
- [How Does Astrocartography Work?](https://astrocarto.org/posts/how-does-astrocartography-work/): Method and map mechanics.
- [Astrocartography Map Interpretation](https://astrocarto.org/posts/astrocartography-map-interpretation/): How to read your map.
- [Astrocartography Symbols Meaning](https://astrocarto.org/posts/astrocartography-symbols-meaning/): Line types (MC, IC, ASC, DSC) explained.

## Pricing & Plans

- [Pricing](https://astrocarto.org/pricing/): Free tier (10 credits), one-time Standard ($9.9, 100 AI questions forever), Professional ($18.9), and Plus subscription ($6.9/month or $59/year, 500 credits per billing period). Maps and basic features remain free.

## Languages

English is the default. Localized homepages and many tools are available at:

- [中文](https://astrocarto.org/zh/)
- [Español](https://astrocarto.org/es/)
- [Português](https://astrocarto.org/pt/)
- [Italiano](https://astrocarto.org/it/)
- [Deutsch](https://astrocarto.org/de/)

Append the same path after the locale prefix (e.g. `/zh/astrocartography-calculator/`).

## Legal & Contact

- [Contact](https://astrocarto.org/contact/): Support and business inquiries.
- [Privacy Policy](https://astrocarto.org/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://astrocarto.org/terms-of-service)
- [Refund Policy](https://astrocarto.org/refund-policy)

## Optional

- [Homepage](https://astrocarto.org/): Landing page with map generator and pricing overview.
- [Sitemap](https://astrocarto.org/sitemap.xml): Complete list of public URLs and last-modified dates.
